provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall broad reptilian alien Veshan warrior in dark green-grey overlapping scales with heavy brow ridges and amber slit-pupil eyes, bony crest ridge, thick tail, wearing dark bronze forged plate armor shaped to follow natural scale ridges with visible hammer marks, crimson house sash, a heavy blade at the hip, the armor shows intentional imperfections, aggressive forward lean, everything is triangular angular forged
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: Cross-faction comparison subject. Faction-appropriate costume for the specified role, useful for teaching same-role-different-faction visual discrimination.
